arts.ttl: New Mohamed Salah transfer stance emerges after Liverpool contract bombshell
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool transfer news with Mohamed Salah's contract set to expire at the end of the season and talks of his next destination emerging

arts.ttl: Loris Karius 'considering retirement' as he opens up on major Liverpool errors
arts.sum: The former Reds' keeper has confessed he doesn't know if he'll play again after struggling to find a club six years on from his infamous part in Liverpool's Champions League final defeat to Real Madrid

arts.ttl: ‘Makes no sense’ – Icon not convinced by Liverpool transfer idea, player doesn’t fit in
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush joining Liverpool would make no sense as there’s not a position for him, and he’s not a direct replacement for Mohamed Salah. That’s according to Lothar Matthaus, speaking to SportBILD, who thinks Inter Milan would be a better destination than Liverpool for the Egyptian star. Marmoush has continued to earn admirers around Europe The post ‘Makes no sense’ – Icon not convinced by Liverpool transfer idea, player doesn’t fit in appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I was close to going to Real Madrid – but as soon as Liverpool came in, that was it
arts.sum: Few players say no to Real Madrid when they express an interest in them, but one Liverpool star turned down Los Blancos' advances to play at Anfield early in his career

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola releases statement ahead of Liverpool showdown and says 'I was caught off guard'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has released a statement after Manchester City threw away a three-goal lead against Feyenoord before Sunday's trip to Liverpool

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Real Madrid - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news before the Champions League clash against Real Madrid with the Echo providing all the TV details you need to know

arts.ttl: Peter Crouch shares who he genuinely thinks is better now – Kylian Mbappe or Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday and two of the biggest players in world football will collide here. Indeed, while Liverpool...

arts.ttl: The day Real Madrid fans sang You'll Never Walk Alone
arts.sum: Ahead of the game, the Reds had placed a bouquet of flowers in the area where Madrid fans were seated as a tribute to Amancio Amaro, a former star of the Spanish club who had recently passed away. Back in early 2023, Liverpool and Real Madrid met at Anfield for the first leg of the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: 'Minds scrambled' - National media spot Man City reaction to Feyenoord collapse before Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool face Manchester City at Anfield in the Premier League on Sunday with Pep Guardiola's team on a six-game winless streak

arts.ttl: Defeat at Liverpool would likely end Man City’s title hopes – Ilkay Gundogan
arts.sum: City travel to Anfield on the back of another demoralising result.
